productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Grey Striped Shirt
description: Composition Grey and black striped shirt made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves and double buttoned cuffs, spread collar, front buttoned placket and curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Stripes that add a great deal of style to your formal look is what united colors of benetton brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal trousers and black leather footwear for that classic look. Model statistics The product is a size XL on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
